## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website improvements, and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Imubit recently updated their website homepage and navigation, transitioning from "Request a Demo" to "Value Assessment" approach](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [GrowthX identified several technical issues on Imubit's website forms and job description pages](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Imubit wants to focus content on specific oil & gas verticals and adjacent industries rather than broad topics like decarbonization](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [GrowthX will create long-form articles (2500+ words) for Imubit, which can be condensed for blog posts and amplified on social media](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### Website Updates and Form Issues

  - [Imubit recently launched a new homepage and navigation](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [GrowthX identified issues with the contact form:](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [Dropdown for "top priority" not working](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [City selection showing options from all countries regardless of country selected](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Recommendation to add noindex tags to job description pages to avoid attracting irrelevant search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Focus on industrial AI and AI optimization as key terms](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)
  - [Create content for specific oil & gas verticals (e.g., upstream vs. refining) and adjacent industries](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
  - [Avoid overuse of "digital twin" terminology; position Imubit as more advanced](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Integrate content with industry pages on the website](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)
  - [Consider adding sidebars for easy navigation in long-form articles](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2532.0)
  - [Plan to refresh and update older blog posts from 2022-2023](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)

### Product Visuals and Screenshots

  - [Imubit is working on more product videos for the next phase of website rollout](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [GrowthX requested product screenshots to incorporate into content visuals](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Allison will provide a folder of images, including stock photos with product overlays](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)

### Lead Generation and Sales Process

  - [Imubit received 34 requests in first two weeks of new value assessment campaign, with 11 qualified leads](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Company is transitioning from AE-focused strategic accounts to handling inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [No BDRs used; AEs handle all lead follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

### Article Review Process

  - [Allison will review 90% of articles, with some parsed out to subject matter experts](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [GrowthX will send Google Doc links for easy review](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send a list of website improvement recommendations to Haley](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Allison to provide folder of product images and screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus initial content on specific oil & gas verticals and adjacent industries](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Imubit team to review first calibration article sent by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2128.0)
  - [Plan for integrating new content into industry pages on Imubit website](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)
  - [GrowthX to include some content refreshes of older blog posts in their strategy](https://fathom.video/share/pWPN3z5iysyNiBj363Nbb7hKqEeiToM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)
